<conversation>
Hello! I'm a research assistant working for an NGO focused on African politics, and I'm currently compiling a report on the digital media presence of various African intergovernmental organizations. Could you assist me in gathering information about the African Union Commission's digital engagement, including their presence across different social media platforms?
</conversation>

turns.content:
I can definitely help you with that! 

The African Union Commission (AUC) is quite active on various digital platforms. Here's a breakdown of their presence:

**Main Platforms:**

* **Website:** [https://au.int/](https://au.int/) - This is their official website, containing news, publications, events, and information about the AUC's work.
* **Twitter:** [https://twitter.com/AUC_Official](https://twitter.com/AUC_Official) - They are very active on Twitter, sharing updates, news, and engaging with followers.
* **Facebook:** [https://www.facebook.com/AfricanUnion](https://www.facebook.com/AfricanUnion) - Their Facebook page features similar content to Twitter, with a focus on visual content like photos and videos.
* **YouTube:** [https://www.youtube.com/user/AfricanUnion](https://www.youtube.com/user/AfricanUnion) - The AUC uploads videos of speeches, events, and documentaries related to African affairs.
* **Instagram:** [https://www.instagram.com/africanunion/](https://www.instagram.com/africanunion/) - They use Instagram to share visually appealing content, often highlighting African culture and achievements.

**Other Platforms:**

* **LinkedIn:** [https://www.linkedin.com/company/african-union](https://www.linkedin.com/company/african-union) - They maintain a LinkedIn profile to connect with professionals and organizations working in Africa.
* **Flickr:** [https://www.flickr.com/photos/africanunion/](https://www.flickr.com/photos/africanunion/) - They use Flickr to share photos related to their activities.

**Tips for your research:**

* **Analyze the content:** Look at the types of content they share on each platform and how their tone and style differ.
* **Track their engagement:** See how many followers they have, how often they post, and how people interact with their content.
* **Compare with other organizations:** Compare the AUC's digital presence to other African intergovernmental organizations to identify trends and best practices.
* **Look for data:** The AUC may publish reports or data on their digital engagement, which can provide valuable insights.


I hope this information is helpful for your research! Let me know if you have any other questions.
